emails.subject: SRP deal 805316
emails.body: SRP deal 805316 Holden, SRP is comming back saying that they do not see deal 805316 on 9/12. Can you look into this Thanks Mike P. Purcell Settlements Coordinator Volume Management-Portland 503-464-8297

emails.subject: RE: SRP deal 805316
emails.body: RE: SRP deal 805316 The deal was done between Mark and Janice at SRP. I heard him make the call. Also, do you have any more avenues with PAC tranny like a supervisor or something. I am not really in a position to negotiate with anyone. They all claim that they can't change the Oasis system. To: Salisbury, Holden

emails.subject: RE: SRP deal 805316
emails.body: You might ask Sean or Diana. See what they think.. I know of the schedulers Dave and Bonnie, but I don't think they will be much help. To: Purcell, Mike
